prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Normal
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.6 kg; Height 184.8 cm; BMI 19.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/79 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.8%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.6%; current 8.4%), FPG (12 months ago 188mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 206mg/dL; 3 months ago 200mg/dL; current 203mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.3kg; 9 months ago 67.7kg; 6 months ago 69.3kg; 3 months ago 63.7kg; current 66.6kg), Height (12 months ago 184.8cm; 9 months ago 184.8cm; 6 months ago 184.8cm; 3 months ago 184.8cm; current 184.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 19.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 79mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 79mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 18U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 26U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 23U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 33U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; current 51mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 190mg/g; 9 months ago 211mg/g; 6 months ago 221mg/g; 3 months ago 245mg/g; current 238mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 84mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 47mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 47mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 167mg/dL; 9 months ago 183mg/dL; 6 months ago 181mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 172mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.07 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
